fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related inventory movement line.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Registered Whse. Activity Line table.

fields.name: Source Subtype
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Registered Whse. Activity Line table.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Subline No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the subline on the related inventory movement.

fields.name: Source Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the line relates to.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Registered Whse. Activity Line table.

fields.name: Shelf No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shelf number of the item for informational use.

fields.name: Sorting Sequence No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Registered Whse. Activity Line table.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Registered Whse. Activity Line table.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Registered Whse. Activity Line table.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Registered Whse. Activity Line table.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Registered Whse. Activity Line table.

fields.name: Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Registered Whse. Activity Line table.

fields.name: Shipping Advice
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipping advice for the registered inventory movement line.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the warehouse activity must be completed.

fields.name: Destination Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of destination that is associated with the registered inventory movement line.

fields.name: Destination No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Registered Whse. Activity Line table.

fields.name: Whse. Activity No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Registered Whse. Activity Hdr. table.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Registered Whse. Activity Line table.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Registered Whse. Activity Hdr. table.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Registered Whse. Activity Line table.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number of the item that was moved.

fields.name: Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lot number of the item that was moved.

fields.name: Warranty Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the warranty date of the serial number or lot number that was moved.

fields.name: Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expiration date of the serial number or lot number that was moved.

fields.name: Package No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the package number of the item that was moved.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the zone code where the bin on the registered inventory movement is located.

fields.name: Action Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the action type for the inventory movement line.

fields.name: Special Equipment Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Registered Whse. Activity Line table.
